posts.text:
Thank you, sir!


Rep. Riley M. Moore (@RepRileyMoore)

It was an honor to hear @michaeljknowles’ excellent speech at the National Catholic Prayer Breakfast this morning. 

On this solemnity of St. Joseph, Catholics should be proud of all the work we’ve done to make America great. 

From Commodore John Barry, “the Father of the U.S. Navy” to Venerable Fulton Sheen who brought the faith to millions, you can’t tell the story of America without us.



— https://nitter.net/RepRileyMoore/status/20347

The pleasure was all mine—excellent to meet you in person!


Sachin Jose (@Sachinettiyil)

It was wonderful meeting political commentator and podcast host Michael Knowles at the National Catholic Prayer Breakfast in DC. He’s a truly inspiring figure for millions of young Catholics.





— https://nitter.net/Sachinettiyil/status/2034702638000820291#m

“Why didn’t you tell me about Pearl Harbor?”

No press conference response will ever top it.

Video

👍 🇺🇸 ✝️


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

Presidential Message on the Feast of Saint Joseph

whitehouse.gov/briefings-sta…




— https://nitter.net/PressSec/status/2034626878720319884#m

Greta Thunberg screamed at us for years that the world would end if we didn’t stop burning oil.

Now she is screaming at President Trump because he won’t let people burn oil.

I’m beginning to think her schtick was never really about “climate change”… nitter.net/MKnowlesShow/status/20…

Video
Seriously though, extraterrestrials aren’t real, and the very concept of “aliens” is diabolical.

St. Cyril of Jerusalem


That Catholic Guy 🇻🇦 (@Catholic_bro)

Which lesser-known saint deserves more attention?



— https://nitter.net/Catholic_bro/status/2034328985900040255#m

If the WH goes all in on extraterrestrials, @MattWalshBlog is going to be insufferable.


Skywatch Signal (@UAPWatchers)

🚨Well this is interesting... Aliens.Gov
